scope: diagnostic-only attribution of the active l<=2 volume-normalized persistent-edge backbone; no representation, loss, sampler, seed, data-order or optimizer change

decision_rule.optimization_delay: if coefficient/edge/internal residual/V gradients are initially zero and activate only after their zero-initialized output maps move, qualify one small-nonzero-initialization repair
decision_rule.edge_staleness: if later-layer edge/node/vector probes add material span while the persistent edge-derived probe stalls, qualify per-layer dynamic edge refresh
decision_rule.moment_collision: if matched equal-count environments agree in first/second moments but differ in fourth-order fingerprints, retain collision as a demonstrated representation limitation rather than inferring it only from validation loss
decision_rule.boundary: No diagnostic result changes historical H1a failure or authorizes slots, reciprocal carriers, joint training, H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT before the separately frozen next mechanism.
